description: Orchestrator -- the main render loop coordinating Puppeteer, FFmpeg, and the virtualized clock per Section 4.4 steps 1-5. Spawns Puppeteer and FFmpeg child process, iterates through frames, sends frame commands to the page, waits for render completion, captures pixels, pipes to FFmpeg, closes stdin when done. Implements C-02 (Puppeteer+Three.js+FFmpeg pipeline) and C-03 (deterministic virtualized timing) at the integration level.
notes: Tier 3 engine integration. The central coordination point -- most Tier 4+ objectives depend on this. Spec completed via 4-round deliberation. Key decisions: single render() method with full lifecycle ownership, always-validate manifest, explicit geometry/camera registry parameters, inline transition handling (crossfade/dip_to_black/cut), lazy setup/eager teardown (max 2 scenes active), pre-flight image existence check, explicit canvas clear for gap frames, V1 limitation on per-plane opacity (PlaneRef.opacity ignored with warning).
